description: Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ! Case diameter: 43 mm Case thickness: 8 mm Dial shape: Square Basemetal square case Pink genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Pink dial with copper hands Q& Q branding on the dial Design on the dial in metallic and crystal embellishments Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters
